children.heading: Grants to local and State educational agencies for Federal share; duration of granting authority; amount of Federal share
children.label: a Grants to local and State educational agencies for Federal share; duration of granting authority; amount of Federal share
A
children.text: The Secretary may make grants to local educational agencies for the Federal share of the costs of carrying out an asbestos detection program meeting the standards established by the Secretary under . Grants may be made under this section only during the two-year period beginning on .section 3606(a)(1) of this titleJune 14, 1980

children.label: i
children.text: the State, through the State educational agency or some other appropriate State agency, is making grants to local educational agencies for asbestos hazard detection programs, and

children.label: ii
children.text: such programs meet the standards established by the Secretary under .section 3606(a)(1) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: Grants may be made under this section only during the two-year period beginning after .June 14, 1980

Subject to the second sentence of this paragraph, the Federal share of the costs referred to in paragraph (1) shall be 50 percent. Upon a determination by the Secretary that an applicant has limited fiscal resources and would be unable to participate in the program under this section without receiving from the Federal Government, as its Federal share of such costs, an amount greater than the amount permitted under the first sentence of this paragraph, the Secretary may increase the Federal share which may be paid to such applicant by such amount as the Secretary considers appropriate to permit the applicant to participate in the program.

children.heading: Application for grants; procedures applicable for approval; programs completed before ; determinations respecting amount of grantJanuary 1, 1976
children.label: b Application for grants; procedures applicable for approval; programs completed before ; determinations respecting amount of grantJanuary 1, 1976
A
children.text: contains a description of the methods to be used by the local educational agency, or in the case of an application by the State educational agency the methods to be used by the local educational agencies receiving grants from the State, to determine whether hazardous concentrations of asbestos fibers or materials emitting such fibers exist in school buildings under the jurisdiction of such agency;

children.label: B
children.text: contains an estimate of the total cost of the detection program, including such detailed descriptions of the costs of each component of the program as the Secretary may require;

children.label: C
children.text: designates the party which shall conduct the testing for the detection program and describes such party’s qualifications for conducting such testing;

children.label: D
children.text: contains assurances that the program shall be carried out in accordance with standards established by the Secretary under and that any party employed to conduct such testing shall satisfy the competency standards established under such section; andsection 3606(a)(1) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: contains such other information or assurances as the Secretary may require.
The Secretary shall provide the Task Force with a copy of any application submitted to the Secretary under paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: containing the information required under paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: providing assurances that any program for which a grant is sought was carried out in a manner which substantially conforms to the requirements established by the Secretary under .section 3606(a)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The sampling of building and insulation materials.

children.label: C
children.text: Appropriate tests to determine the level of asbestos content in suspected materials, and tests determined to be essential to detect the likelihood of imminent danger to persons within school buildings.

children.heading: Reporting requirements for recipients
children.label: c Reporting requirements for recipients
children.text: Local and State educational agencies receiving grants under this section shall file a report with the Secretary, not later than 120 days after the award of such grant, describing the detection activities which were undertaken, the results of the asbestos detection program, and plans for mitigating any imminent hazards which were detected by the testing. The report shall include a detailed accounting of the funds used to carry out the detection program.

children.heading: Availability of appropriated funds for education and technical assistance programs
children.label: d Availability of appropriated funds for education and technical assistance programs
children.text: During the period in which grants may be made under this section, not more than 20 percent of the funds appropriated to carry out this section may be made available by the Secretary to the Task Force to conduct education and technical assistance programs related to the detection of asbestos hazards in school buildings and the implementation of appropriate actions to mitigate such hazards.
